type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Methanol is used was used in 2016 as a dust suppressant material for drilling and crushing activities related to mining activities. It is estimated that app. 50% eventually evaporates to the atmosphere and 50% reacts with the underlying material.

comments.comment: From the 198 analysis performed at the five outfalls, only one was slighly above the detection limit at Julienne Narrows (0,00059 mg/l vs detection limit of 0.0005 mg/l). For the purpose of NPRI reporting, this was considered as being not sufficient to conclude that lead is present and at what concentration. A zero discharge is considered for NPRI reporting.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Total PAHs were estimated at on 22 kg in 2020, which is less than the reporting threshold. Therefore, reporting is done on a voluntary basis. The significant decrease to annual emissions is explained by the fact that stack tests were performed in 2020, and these were used to generate a site-specific emission factor. In previous years, estimates were based on emission factors obtained many years ago from other pellet plants.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Only the 2022 analytical results were used in the emission calculations, instead of using the average of results over multiple years as with was done in 2021. Furhtermore, the analytical results for IM3 emissions were below the limit of quantification (LoQ) defined in the NPRI guideline (32 pg TEQ) and were therefore considered to be "zero". IM3 was considered to be representative of the emissions of IM1 to IM4, thus setting there D&F emissions also to "zero". The results of IM6 revelaed detection of D&F above the LoQ and were used to calculate emissions of D&F for IM5 and IM6.
